title: Draper 20603 TCT Circular Saw Blade for Wood, 165 x 20mm, 24T
features: For use on hardwood, softwood, MDF, chipboard and plywood
Compatible with most 165mm circular saws with a 20mm and 16mm bore
description: This Tungsten Carbide-Tipped (TCT) circular saw blade is hardened and tempered to ensure a long life. High-quality precision-ground carbide teeth make the blade robust for rapid cutting. Designed for use on hardwood, softwood, MDF, chipboard and plywood. Compatible with most 165mm circular saws with a 20mm and 16mm bore. EN847-1 Standard.
